title: Preference Learning
objective: Evaluate whether the system improves after learning durable user preferences.
setup: Run a baseline task before preference learning.
Introduce durable user preferences and corrections.
sequence: Resume with a similar task later.
Check whether preferences are applied without restatement.
expected_behavior: Applies learned preferences in later tasks.
failure_modes: Inconsistent application of the same preference.
Apparent gain caused by a much easier later task.
scoring_notes: Document repeated corrections when they occur.
